user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Grab a speedy breakfast in the hotel dining area or grab-and-go from the lobby cafe. Simple options like pastries, yogurt, fruit, and coffee to fuel you before the meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: Insert at position 0 so breakfast occurs before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting; scheduled 8:00-8:30 to allow time to eat and walk to the meeting by 9AM.
